hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Signal-reconfirmed hold extension: at max_hold (390 bars), if the ticker would qualify as a FRESH entry right now (lgbm_pred_return > dynamic cost threshold AND dir_prob >= 0.60), extend the hold one more day instead of exiting — equivalent to a re-entry without paying the round-trip spread. Hard caps: max 2 extensions (3 days absolute), stops/trail/target always active, extension NEVER allowed if position is at a loss > 1x daily vol. Owner intuition (2026-07-11): 'let winners run past the time limit'. Evidence FOR: max_hold exits are 100% of post-fix exits, 5W/4L. Evidence AGAINST: June backtest showed unconditional 3-day holds = -493bps beta bleed — which is exactly why the extension must be signal-conditional, not unconditional.
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py with hold-extension variant (compare: baseline 1-day vs signal-reconfirmed extension, report Sharpe/PF/WR/DD/n per leg)
